scripts.clean: npm cache clean --force && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); const dirs = ['packages/shared/dist', 'server/dist', 'client/dist', 'dist']; dirs.forEach(d => { const p = path.join(process.cwd(), d); if (fs.existsSync(p)) fs.rmSync(p, {recursive: true}); });"
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w @game-servum/shared" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @game-servum/shared && npm run build --workspace=server && npm run build --workspace=client
scripts.build:agent: npm run build -w @game-servum/shared && npm run build --workspace=server && node scripts/build-agent-windows.mjs
scripts.build:dashboard: npm run build -w @game-servum/shared && npm run build --workspace=client && node scripts/build-dashboard-windows.mjs
scripts.build:linux: npm run build -w @game-servum/shared && npm run build --workspace=client && node scripts/build-dashboard-linux.mjs
scripts.build:all: npm run build:agent && npm run build:dashboard && npm run build:linux
